basic_details.job_title: NCBS TIFR Accounts Officer Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.organization_name: National Centre for Biological Sciences, Tata Institute of Fundamental Research
basic_details.short_information: National Centre for Biological Sciences, Tata Institute of Fundamental Research (NCBS TIFR) has officially released a notification for the recruitment of 1 Accounts Officer 'C' Posts. This recruitment drive offers a great opportunity for candidates looking for research jobs. Interested and eligible candidates can apply online through the official website.

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 43 years as of 01-01-2026. Age Relaxation: OBC category candidates are included in the maximum age limit as per government norms.

qualification.education_qualification: Post Graduate in Commerce with 55% marks and Advanced Accountancy/Auditing/Taxation OR Graduate in Commerce/B.Com with 60% marks and inter-CA or CMA. Proficiency in computers and 5-6 years of experience.
qualification.details: Post Graduate from a recognised University/Institute with an aggregate of 55% marks in Commerce with Advanced Accountancy/Auditing / Taxation as one of the subjects. Graduate in Commerce/B.Com from recognised University/Institute with an aggregate of 60% marks with inter-CA or CMA. Proficiency in the use of personal computers and applications. 6 years' experience in Level 7 and / or Level 8 or with equivalent TME (total monthly emoluments) OR 5 years' experience in Level 6 and / or Level 7 and / or Level 8 or with equivalent TME (total monthly emoluments) with Diploma in Finance and Accounts.

salary_details.pay_scale: Level 10 (stage-1) Basic Pay: 56,100/- + allowances as per Central Government norms
salary_details.details: Level 10 (stage-1) Basic Pay: 56,100/- Allowances: As per Central Government norms.

selection_process: Written test Skill test Job oriented practical test Interview
how_to_apply: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the NCBS TIFR Accounts Officer 'C' Recruitment 2026.
Applications must be submitted online on or before 20-07-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of NCBS TIFR to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

content_sections.heading: NCBS TIFR Accounts Officer 'C' Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates who are interested in applying for the NCBS TIFR Recruitment 2026 should first download and carefully read the official notification PDF. The notification contains complete details about vacancy distribution, eligibility criteria, age limit, stipend/salary, selection process, important dates, and application instructions. Reading the official document is important to ensure that you meet all requirements before submitting the application form. Download NCBS TIFR Accounts Officer 'C' Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: NCBS TIFR Accounts Officer 'C' Eligibility Criteria 2026
content_sections.text: Post Graduate from a recognised University/Institute with an aggregate of 55% marks in Commerce with Advanced Accountancy/Auditing / Taxation as one of the subjects. Graduate in Commerce/B.Com from recognised University/Institute with an aggregate of 60% marks with inter-CA or CMA. Proficiency in the use of personal computers and applications. 6 years' experience in Level 7 and / or Level 8 or with equivalent TME (total monthly emoluments) OR 5 years' experience in Level 6 and / or Level 7 and / or Level 8 or with equivalent TME (total monthly emoluments) with Diploma in Finance and Accounts.

content_sections.text: Maximum Age Limit: 43 years as of 01-01-2026. Age Relaxation: OBC category candidates are included in the maximum age limit as per government norms.

content_sections.text: Level 10 (stage-1) Basic Pay: 56,100/- Allowances: As per Central Government norms.

content_sections.heading: How to Apply
content_sections.text: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the NCBS TIFR Accounts Officer 'C' Recruitment 2026. Applications must be submitted online on or before 20-07-2026. To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section. Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of NCBS TIFR to complete the application. Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details. Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format. Pay the application fee online, if applicable. Review all details carefully before submitting the form. Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

content_sections.heading: NCBS TIFR Accounts Officer 'C' Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the NCBS TIFR Accounts Officer 'C' recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your online application for the Accounts Officer 'C' post is 20th July 2026. Ensure you complete the process before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What are the educational qualifications required for the Accounts Officer 'C' position?
faq.answer: Candidates need a Post Graduate degree in Commerce with 55% marks or a Graduate degree in Commerce with 60% marks and inter-CA or CMA. Proficiency in computers and relevant experience are also mandatory.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for applying to this post?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for applicants is 43 years as of January 1, 2026. Age relaxation will be provided for OBC category candidates as per government rules.

faq.question: Q4. How much is the application fee for the Accounts Officer 'C' post?
faq.answer: The application fee is Rs. 1,000/- for General, OBC, PwBD, Ex-servicemen, and Women categories. SC/ST candidates are exempted from paying the application fee.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary offered for the Accounts Officer 'C' position?
faq.answer: Selected candidates will be placed at Level 10 (stage-1) with a basic pay of Rs. 56,100/- per month, along with other allowances as per Central Government norms.

faq.question: Q6. How many vacancies are available for the Accounts Officer 'C' post?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy available for the Accounts Officer 'C' post in this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for the Accounts Officer 'C' recruitment?
faq.answer: The selection process typically involves a written test, skill test, job-oriented practical test, and an interview.

faq.question: Q8. Is there any experience required for this post?
faq.answer: Yes, candidates need 6 years of experience in Level 7 and/or Level 8 or equivalent, or 5 years of experience in Level 6 and/or Level 7 and/or Level 8 with a Diploma in Finance and Accounts.

faq.question: Q9. Can candidates from any state apply for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The recruitment is for NCBS TIFR, located in Bangalore, Karnataka. Candidates from all states are eligible to apply if they meet the specified criteria.

faq.question: Q10. How can I apply for the Accounts Officer 'C' position?
faq.answer: Applications must be submitted online through the official website of NCBS TIFR. Ensure all details are filled correctly and required documents are uploaded before the last date.
